programmes.show_description: The Glovers fight a harsh winter on the highway while low bedding their 45-tonne winch to Erie Mountain. On Gollen, Craig's exit plan faces delays from breakdowns and a block collision.
Dirt road veteran Dennis Dent goes head-to-head with a lifelong nemesis. Meanwhile, Christian Reynolds takes on the wild back country on a vital mission to build a bridge.
Kev and Gary face a herculean task extracting a fully loaded 44-tonne artic from a forest. Recovery op Bohdan finds himself under a bus in central London.
When Storm Isha hits Northumberland, Mouse attempts a dangerous rescue in high winds; Mick saves a dustcart from toppling over and Steve hauls a fully loaded tanker out of the mud.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. The police have their hands full with the machinations of forgers, fakers and takers.
Officers contend with riotous World Cup revellers, an offender who has breached his ASBO and a shifty suspected drug dealer.
The cops are on the trail of a group of thieves who targeted a supermarket. A rude biker finds himself the subject of police attention.
Western. U.S. Marshal Bovard comes to a small border town to identify and arrest a fugitive, but the whole town seems determined to prevent the Marshal from doing his job. (1959)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western. U.S. Marshal Bovard comes to a small border town to identify and arrest a fugitive, but the whole town seems determined to prevent the Marshal from doing his job. (1959)
Western starring Robert Ryan, Rock Hudson and James Arness. Three Texan brothers return home from the Civil War and find themselves on opposite sides of the law. (1952)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western starring Robert Ryan, Rock Hudson and James Arness. Three Texan brothers return home from the Civil War and find themselves on opposite sides of the law. (1952)
Ant and Layton must move a former British Rail Shunter Locomotive but reversing round a tight corner and down a country lane will push rookie Layton's steering ability to its limit.
Action-packed observational documentary series presented by Jamie Theakston. The traffic cops search for a suspected hit and run driver.
Police enter a 'house of horrors' seeking a man on the run. Plus, an epic 45-mile pursuit.
Doors get smashed in dawn raids on drug dealers, shots are fired in a suburban siege, and bad guys are chased at more than 100mph.
PC Tommy Wade is forced to ram a car to a stop - but why is the driver so desperate to get away from the cops? And police race to a serious two-car collision.
...Out to Get You? Speed cameras are snapping more Brits than ever - but is it really about safety or are drivers just easy targets? In this eye-opening special, we hit the road to find out.
With first time access to a police CID unit, this series follows detectives investigating serious cases - from the start of an investigation to the moment they confront their suspects.
Mulder and Scully are called in to investigate cases of seemingly spontaneous combustion.
Craig and the crew return home to log a local block, but Kylee discovers its road is just as treacherous as Gollen. Heavy snow buries Brent's plan to haul logs from one of his blocks.
Turbo is fighting to stay on track and on schedule to complete a marathon trek home. Meanwhile, in Tasmania Euan is hitching a ride to deliver a volatile road.
In the North East a truck has taken a tumble into a ditch in the dead of night. In Leicestershire Snods has got his hands full craning a car out of a field.
Mouse is tasked with recovering a delivery truck that's been blown onto its side and Dan is attempting to remove the remains of a burnt-out tar truck.

Action-packed observational documentary series presented by Jamie Theakston. The traffic cops search for a suspected hit and run driver.
Zippy the sniffer dog makes an interesting discovery and the team's new recruits are put to the test by a pair of suspected burglars.
The team pulls over a very angry driver and the Air Support Unit has its work cut out pursuing an athletic burglar.
Action-packed western starring James Cagney and Viveca Lindfors. A drifter is appointed sheriff of a small town and clashes with his embittered deputy. (1955)

Action-packed western starring James Cagney and Viveca Lindfors. A drifter is appointed sheriff of a small town and clashes with his embittered deputy. (1955)
Western starring Ray Milland and Mary Murphy. A gunfighter has to prove his innocence after being wrongly accused of a double murder. (1955)

Western starring Ray Milland and Mary Murphy. A gunfighter has to prove his innocence after being wrongly accused of a double murder. (1955)
Sam must carefully lift a shipping container that's been converted into a summer cabin over a high hedge and through a narrow gap barely wider than the container itself!
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. North Yorkshire's road crime team chase a gang using 4x4s on nightly thefts from industrial estates.
The interceptors come knocking for a suspected drugs dealer who's been on the run for two years.
When a dog handler is taken out of the chase, multiple cops and the police chopper take up the hunt for a driver who flees on foot.
A cop pursues a vehicle after a report of a cloned car with a balaclava-wearing driver. In Byker, PCs witness what looks like a drug deal through a car window.
Near Harrogate, cop Paddy chases a driver seen using his phone, leading to a dangerous high-speed pursuit. On the A1, cop Paul races to intercept a suspected fraudster. (Ep2/2)
We start with reports of a break-in at a garage. Officers receive a call about a fight with a knife and discover a trail of blood leading into a block of flats.
Upset by a death in her family, Scully becomes entangled in the machinations of a serial killer on the loose and a murderer on death row.
